prediction.reasoning: Based on typical stock volatility patterns, AXP (American Express) has historically shown daily volatility around 1-2%. For a 2-day prediction, I applied a random walk model with drift, assuming annualized volatility of ~25% and slight positive momentum. The point estimate reflects minimal expected drift, while confidence intervals widen based on cumulative uncertainty over the 2-day period using normal distribution assumptions.
